label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 12

extraction.one_line_summary: MOLANO Juan Sebastian won via UAE's audacious right-side space creation with Oliveira's leadout, defeating favored Groves who dropped chain at critical moment.
tactical_patterns: UAE deliberately chose right-hand side against conventional left-bend wisdom, creating space frontier others ignored for Molano upset.
Roglic opportunistically contested intermediate sprint at 20km out, gaining 4sec bonus over Evenepoel despite being GC-focused before mountain stage.
GC riders mass-exited at 3km marker, revealing collective tactical agreement to avoid technical finale crashes before Tourmalet stage.

rider_signals.MOLANO Juan Sebastian: positive: UAE GC team delivered sprint win through unconventional positioning, suggesting deeper leadout resources than expected
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: negative: mechanical failure (dropped chain) cost win despite being marked favorite and extending points lead to 200
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: actively hunting 4sec intermediate bonus despite being 1:32 down, showing aggression to close 23sec gap to Evenepoel
rider_signals.VAN POPPEL Boy: neutral: third place after supposed leadout role for Houle who got trapped, suggesting team miscommunication on finale
rider_signals.OLIVEIRA Rui: positive: delivered dominant leadout from middle pack position, UAE showing sprint firepower despite GC focus with three top-30 riders
